title: Project: photon
description: Project: photon is a Minecraft client side Modpack made to turn the game into a cinematic experience.
body:
This modpack is built for players who want a deeply immersive and cinematic Minecraft experience without straying from the core gameplay. It combines performance-boosting mods, stunning visual enhancements, ambient audio, and animation overhauls to breathe new life into the vanilla world.

Explore Minecraft like never before with realistic camera movement, reworked third-person perspectives, and expressive character animations. From fluttering leaves and reactive footstep sounds to dynamic weather effects and thunder that echoes across the landscape, every part of the environment feels alive.

Key features include:

- Immersion & Atmosphere: Mods like Complementary Shaders, AmbientSounds, Enhanced Visuals, and Perception enhance lighting, audio, and environmental ambiance for a truly atmospheric world.

- Visual Overhauls: Enjoy smoother, more expressive characters with Fresh Animations, 3D Skin Layers, Not Enough Animations, and FreshMoves. Plus, see your tools on your back with BackTools and reimagined leaves with Better Leaves.

- Performance & Optimization: Powered by Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, and ModernFix to ensure high framerates even with all the enhancements.

- Camera & Perspective Mods: Get cinematic with Replay Mod, RealCamera, Freecam, and Camera Overhaul for dynamic recording and exploration.

- Improved UI & Utilities: BetterF3, Mod Menu, and AppleSkin give you a cleaner and more informative interface.

- Building Tools: Includes Litematica, MaLiLib, and utilities to help creators and builders craft their worlds efficiently.

- Exploration Enhancements: With JourneyMap, Spyglass Improvements, and Shulker Box Tooltips, every journey is smarter and more intuitive.

- Ambient Effects: Presence Footsteps, Reactive Music, Falling Leaves, and Immersive Thunder help round out a world that looks, sounds, and feels alive.

- Whether you're building, exploring, recording, or just soaking in the vibes, this modpack turns vanilla Minecraft into a polished and immersive sandbox—all while remaining lightweight and multiplayer-ready.

Pleas note that I don't know if the modpack runs smoothly on all devices.

**!!Please ask your server owner if you are allowed to use the modpack.!!**
